# The Three Hunters

> [!success] 💍 Event · Cost: **3** · Fellowship

![[143013.png]]

---

Play only if you control (Fellowship) Aragorn.
**Quest Action:** Choose 3 heroes committed to the quest. Ready those heroes. Until the end of the round, each of the chosen heroes gets +1 WP, +1 ATK, and +1 DEF.

---

> *"We shall makes such a chase as shall be accounted a marvel among the Three Kindreds: Elves, Dwarves, and Men. Forth the Three Hunters!"*
> — Aragorn, The Two Towers

**Pack:** [[The Treason of Saruman]] #13
